### p5.collide v0.7.3 ###
p5.js:59792 
🌸 p5.js says: There's a syntax error due to a symbol that wasn't expected at its place.
Usually this is due to a typo. Check the line number in the error below for anything missing/extra.
For more: https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Errors/Unexpected_token#What_went_wrong
game.js:210 Uncaught SyntaxError: Unexpected token '<' (at game.js:210:1)
analysis:
- Issue identified: A `SyntaxError: Unexpected token '<'` occurred in `game.js` at line 210. This was caused by an extraneous `<code filename="ui.js">` tag being present within the JavaScript file itself, which is not valid JavaScript syntax.
- Files affected: `game.js`
- Changes needed: Remove the incorrectly placed `<code filename="ui.js">` tag from the `game.js` file.
